title: Welcome to Social Media Manager Confidential!
summary: This podcast aims to provide realistic, positive, and insightful resources for social media managers to build ethical and profitable businesses that support their lifestyle goals. It offers a safe space for sharing strategies, content tips, and transparent advice within the social media management industry.
source_file: Welcome to Social Media Manager Confidential! [GDE_wSN3myA].m4a

root_steps.title: Introduction
root_steps.description: Welcome to the podcast, introducing the host and the purpose of the show.

root_steps.title: Host Background
root_steps.description: Chantel shares her journey from single mom to founder of a multi-six-figure social media management agency.

root_steps.title: Podcast Vision
root_steps.description: Discussion on the need for a safe space for social media managers to share strategies, content tips, and transparent advice.

root_steps.title: Weekly Content
root_steps.description: Every Friday, the host and guests will discuss the social media management world without gatekeeping.

root_steps.title: Community Invitation
root_steps.description: Invitation to join the exclusive private community for social media managers at community.sugarfunchnetmarketing.com.

root_steps.title: Call to Action
root_steps.description: Encouragement to follow the show to not miss any new episodes and thanks for listening.
